My Journey

Hello! I'm Nishant Raj, a Computer Science student at Lovely Professional University with a passion for data analysis, software development, and algorithmic problem-solving.

My journey in tech started with curiosity about how data can tell stories and drive decisions. I specialize in transforming complex datasets into actionable insights using Python, Pandas, Power BI, and data visualization tools.

I believe in learning by building — every project is an opportunity to apply theory to real-world challenges, from analyzing 270,000+ Olympic records to building hospital management systems.

My Approach

I value clean code, analytical thinking, and continuous learning. I focus on writing efficient algorithms, creating meaningful visualizations, and building systems that solve real problems. My goal is to bridge the gap between data science and software engineering.

Hospital Patient Management System

Console-based patient records system with intelligent queue scheduling — priority queue for emergencies, FIFO for regular patients.

RoleDeveloper
DurationAug 2025
OutcomeFunctional scheduling system with CSV-based persistent patient storage
ChallengeDual-queue scheduling logic & file-based data persistence design

IPC Crime Data Analysis

District-wise analysis of IPC crime data uncovering regional crime patterns and trends across India through exploratory data analysis.

RoleData Analyst
Dataset5,000+ records, 120+ variables
OutcomeIdentified high-crime regions & category-wise distributions nationwide
ChallengeHandling 120+ variables & cleaning inconsistent district-level data

Professional Training

Hands-on training programs that sharpened my technical skills.

Data Structures & Algorithms Training

ByteXL TechEd Private Limited  •  LPU PEP Program
Jun 23 – Jul 30, 2025 ⭐ A+ Grade
  • Learned fundamental and advanced DSA — arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, recursion, and sorting techniques.
  • Solved coding problems with focus on time & space complexity optimization through consistent algorithmic practice.
  • Built a Hospital Patient Management System applying priority queue and FIFO queue concepts to real-world scenarios.
  • Secured A+ Grade demonstrating exceptional programming skills and theoretical knowledge across all modules.
